'''âj-t-j-p''' ('''kajatjepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immunoprobe|immunoprobe]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-t-j-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immunoprobe|immunoprobe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-t-j-p
|-
! Lemma
| kajatjepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijatjepoko|thijatjepoko]] || [[word:jijatjepoko|jijatjepoko]] || [[word:shijatjepoko|shijatjepoko]] || [[word:kijatjepoko|kijatjepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujatjepoko|thuthujatjepoko]] || [[word:jujujatjepoko|jujujatjepoko]] || [[word:shushujatjepoko|shushujatjepoko]] || [[word:kukujatjepoko|kukujatjepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujatjepoko|thujatjepoko]] || [[word:jujatjepoko|jujatjepoko]] || [[word:shujatjepoko|shujatjepoko]] || [[word:kujatjepoko|kujatjepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujatjepoko|thujatjepoko]] || [[word:jujatjepoko|jujatjepoko]] || [[word:shujatjepoko|shujatjepoko]] || [[word:kujatjepoko|kujatjepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejatjepoko|thejatjepoko]] || [[word:jejatjepoko|jejatjepoko]] || [[word:shejatjepoko|shejatjepoko]] || [[word:kejatjepoko|kejatjepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojatjepoko|thothojatjepoko]] || [[word:jojojatjepoko|jojojatjepoko]] || [[word:shoshojatjepoko|shoshojatjepoko]] || [[word:kokojatjepoko|kokojatjepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojatjepoko|thojatjepoko]] || [[word:jojatjepoko|jojatjepoko]] || [[word:shojatjepoko|shojatjepoko]] || [[word:kojatjepoko|kojatjepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojatjepoko|thojatjepoko]] || [[word:jojatjepoko|jojatjepoko]] || [[word:shojatjepoko|shojatjepoko]] || [[word:kojatjepoko|kojatjepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjatjepoko|thĂŠjatjepoko]] || [[word:jĂŠjatjepoko|jĂŠjatjepoko]] || [[word:shĂŠjatjepoko|shĂŠjatjepoko]] || [[word:kĂŠjatjepoko|kĂŠjatjepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajatjepoko|thathajatjepoko]] || [[word:jajajatjepoko|jajajatjepoko]] || [[word:shashajatjepoko|shashajatjepoko]] || [[word:kakajatjepoko|kakajatjepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajatjepoko|thajatjepoko]] || [[word:jajatjepoko|jajatjepoko]] || [[word:shajatjepoko|shajatjepoko]] || [[word:kajatjepoko|kajatjepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajatjepoko|thajatjepoko]] || [[word:jajatjepoko|jajatjepoko]] || [[word:shajatjepoko|shajatjepoko]] || [[word:kajatjepoko|kajatjepoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shajatjepithi|shajatjepithi]] || [[word:shajatjepiji|shajatjepiji]] || [[word:shajatjepishi|shajatjepishi]] || [[word:shajatjepiki|shajatjepiki]]
